title: Locksmith

rationales.taskAutomation: Mechanical lockout and key-cutting work is manual and physical; access-control system programming is the growing automatable/digital slice.
rationales.toolMaturity: Smart-lock and access-control management software is credible and improving, shipped by major security vendors.
rationales.adoption: Adoption is growing among commercial locksmiths managing electronic access-control systems; residential lockout work remains manual.
rationales.agenticExposure: An agent can provision and audit access-control credentials remotely; it cannot pick a lock or rekey a physical cylinder on site.

tasksAtRisk: Access-control credential provisioning and audit logs
Scheduling and dispatch of service calls
tasksGrowing: Smart-lock and electronic access-control system installation
Complex mechanical lockout and safe work
salarySource: BLS OES May 2023, SOC 49-9094, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Locksmithing's risk is modest and shifting: mechanical lockout work stays entirely manual, while growth in smart-lock and access-control system installation is reshaping the job's digital half.
